_modes.personaMode: legacy = personas flat at /root/agents/<name> | nested = squads/<squad>/agents/<name> via OWNERSHIP map in paths.js
_modes.stateMode: inline = runtime state inside persona code dir (today) | evicted = var/state/agents/<name>

_doc: Read by paths.js (mtime-cached). Flip a mode + pm2 reload event-bus = physical layout cutover. See docs/research/2026-06-07-archon-restructure-design.md
